'''竏嗟-ch-m-h''' ('''kalachmehoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wont|wont]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-ch-m-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wont|wont]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗟-ch-m-h
|-
! Lemma
| kalachmehoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilachmehoko|thilachmehoko]] || [[word:jilachmehoko|jilachmehoko]] || [[word:shilachmehoko|shilachmehoko]] || [[word:kilachmehoko|kilachmehoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulachmehoko|thuthulachmehoko]] || [[word:jujulachmehoko|jujulachmehoko]] || [[word:shushulachmehoko|shushulachmehoko]] || [[word:kukulachmehoko|kukulachmehoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thulachmehoko|thulachmehoko]] || [[word:julachmehoko|julachmehoko]] || [[word:shulachmehoko|shulachmehoko]] || [[word:kulachmehoko|kulachmehoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thulachmehoko|thulachmehoko]] || [[word:julachmehoko|julachmehoko]] || [[word:shulachmehoko|shulachmehoko]] || [[word:kulachmehoko|kulachmehoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thelachmehoko|thelachmehoko]] || [[word:jelachmehoko|jelachmehoko]] || [[word:shelachmehoko|shelachmehoko]] || [[word:kelachmehoko|kelachmehoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotholachmehoko|thotholachmehoko]] || [[word:jojolachmehoko|jojolachmehoko]] || [[word:shosholachmehoko|shosholachmehoko]] || [[word:kokolachmehoko|kokolachmehoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tholachmehoko|tholachmehoko]] || [[word:jolachmehoko|jolachmehoko]] || [[word:sholachmehoko|sholachmehoko]] || [[word:kolachmehoko|kolachmehoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholachmehoko|tholachmehoko]] || [[word:jolachmehoko|jolachmehoko]] || [[word:sholachmehoko|sholachmehoko]] || [[word:kolachmehoko|kolachmehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦlachmehoko|thﾃｦlachmehoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦlachmehoko|jﾃｦlachmehoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦlachmehoko|shﾃｦlachmehoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦlachmehoko|kﾃｦlachmehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathalachmehoko|thathalachmehoko]] || [[word:jajalachmehoko|jajalachmehoko]] || [[word:shashalachmehoko|shashalachmehoko]] || [[word:kakalachmehoko|kakalachmehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalachmehoko|thalachmehoko]] || [[word:jalachmehoko|jalachmehoko]] || [[word:shalachmehoko|shalachmehoko]] || [[word:kalachmehoko|kalachmehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalachmehoko|thalachmehoko]] || [[word:jalachmehoko|jalachmehoko]] || [[word:shalachmehoko|shalachmehoko]] || [[word:kalachmehoko|kalachmehoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
